title: Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion (Episode 02) vs. Evangelion 1.0
wikitext: ← Back to [[Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0|''Neon Genesis Evangelion'' vs. ''Evangelion 1.0'']]. The 1.0 part corresponding to episode 2 has a difference in the order of events compared to the anime. While the anime shows the fight against Sachiel retrospectively, as a flashback, the film follows the fight against Fourth Angel in the chronological order. Events will be portrayed as per the original anime. ===Face Plant!=== [[Image:02 C200 faceplant 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C08 faceplant 1.jpg|320px]] [[Image:02 C200 faceplant 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C08 faceplant 2.jpg|320px]] ''In Rebuild, she falls onto her knees first. Huh.'' ===Black Eye=== [[Image:02 C222 crack 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C29 crack1.jpg|320px]] [[Image:02 C222 crack 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C29 crack2.jpg|320px]] ''Some new-looking stuff actually flashes on the screen during Sachiel's poundage, but we only have enough room for so much. (Plus these screens are so crappy, you should consider any deprivation an act of mercy.) Shinji's nut has been removed to give us a better view of Sachiel's handsome visage.'' ===Rude Awakening=== [[Image:02 C001 shinji-zomg.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C04 shinji-zomg.jpg|320px]] ===Tokyo-3=== [[File:This is Tokyo-3.png|245px]] [[File:This is Tokyo-3 Jo.png|320px]] [[Image:02_C093_tokyo3.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C26 tokyo3.jpg|320px]] [[File:Tokyo-3 ep. 2.png|245px]] [[File:CG Tokyo-3.png|320px]] [[File:Tokyo-3 ep. 2 2.png|245px]] [[File:Tokyo-3 Jo.png|320px]] ''CG. Yay, w00t w00t.'' ==="I'm Home"=== [[File:Tadaimasu.png|245px]] [[File:Tadaimasu jo.png|320px]] [[File:Yebisu.png|245px]] [[File:Variety.png|320px]] ''Note some variety in the Rebuild counterpart. There's more advertising too. Doritos and all.'' [[File:Drunk.png|245px]] [[File:Drunk jo.png|320px]] ===Pen Pen=== [[Image:02 C152 penpen.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw C13 penpen.jpg]] ===MI-MI-MISATO-SAN!!!=== [[File:Nude.png|245px]] [[File:Nude jo.png|320px]] ===A soul bath=== [[File:Bath.png|245px]] [[File:Bath jo.png|320px]] [[File:Misato bath.png|245px]] [[File:Misato bath jo.png|320px]] ''In addition to the color of the water, Shinji's pose is a mirror image of Misato's. Also, there is a slight presence of Misato's nipples.'' ===''Bousou'' is Japanese for "Batshit Insane"=== ''When the original battle was THAT cool, why change anything? All available cuts of the Eva-01/Sachiel battle correspond to ones in the original, although some have been completely redesigned. And, in over ten years, Sachiel couldn't come up with a more interesting way to piss Sho off than by breaking her arm and poking out her eye. Sheesh...'' [[Image:02 C257 jaws 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C02 jaws 1.jpg|320px]] [[Image:02 C257 jaws 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C02 jaws 2.jpg|320px]] ''The original has more detail in the drawing. Also, the Rebuild sequence is wildly different: Rather than prying the jaw pieces apart and breaking a peg, Sho has to... Eh, better to [[:Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C01 open-up.gif|see it in action yourself]].'' [[Image:02 C260 1 rearing.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C03 1 rearing.jpg|320px]] [[Image:02 C260 2 rawring.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C03 2 rawring.jpg|320px|Dark picture is daaaaaark.]] ''Original much more detailed here, as well. (Then, if we're being dealt a heavy hand of Cel Shading, this might be expected.) At least we get some eye-blinking action. And no more silly jointed mandible piece.'' [[Image:02 C262 flip 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C03 flip1.jpg|320px]] [[Image:02 C262 flip 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C03 flip2.jpg|320px]] [[Image:02 C262 flip 3.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C03 flip3.jpg|320px]] ''Okay, probably impossible to see anything in the shitty trailer caps, but you can pretend.'' [[Image:02 C268 eva01-run-up.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C04 eva01-run-up.jpg|320px]] [[Image:02 C269 eva01-run.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C05 eva01-run.jpg|320px]] ===The blight of the shrunken pylons... Why? Why?=== [[Image:02 C279 atf-rip.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C08 atf-rip.jpg|320px]] ''Taste the rainbow.'' [[Image:02 C282 sachi-eyes.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 hikki-bw2 C30 sachi-eyes.jpg|320px]] ''Sachi's eyes still go all sparkly before he does his crucifix of light thingy. His looks haven't changed in ten years!'' [[Image:02 C288 armtwist 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C53 arm-twist 1.jpg|320px]] [[Image:02 C288 armtwist 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer2 C53 arm-twist 2.jpg|320px]] ''Looks like it's red blood now for our Sachi. Appropriate enough, considering every other Angel known to have blood has it in red.'' [[Image:02 C292 charge 1.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C06 charge 1.jpg|320px]] [[Image:02 C292 charge 2.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C06 charge 2.jpg|320px]] ''The original ''douga'' is represented here frame for frame. Stupidly enough, they let a blooper get through here: Day-Glo Eva-01 is supposed to have PAIRED stripes on her horn, not just one. WHOOPS. (Was it fixed in the final?)'' [[Image:02 C300A crackcore.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 15sec-sc C07 crackcore.jpg|320px]] ''Oooo... Core is spark-ly...'' [[Image:02 C307 kaboom.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C09 kaboom.jpg|320px]] [[Image:02 C308 cross.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C10 cross.jpg|320px]] ''The rainbow symbolizes the homosexual inclinations that Sachiel had been hiding during his extremely short life. With his completely ineffective suicide explosion, he has been liberated... in more ways than one.'' ''Or not.'' ''Not included here is the first frame or two, showing that Sachiel bursts into a bloodbath a split second before KABOOM! Lovely.'' [[Image:02 C311 emergence.jpg|245px]] [[Image:Rebuild1 trailer1 C46 emergence.jpg|320px]] ''Drastic differences, most evident in motion. Rebuild Eva-01 has more of a "possessed Eva-03"-type walk going on. Also note how she looks suspiciously like a man in a suit.'' ← Back to [[Guides:Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0|''Neon Genesis Evangelion'' vs. ''Evangelion 1.0'']]. html:
← Back to Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0.

The 1.0 part corresponding to episode 2 has a difference in the order of events compared to the anime. While the anime shows the fight against Sachiel retrospectively, as a flashback, the film follows the fight against Fourth Angel in the chronological order.

Events will be portrayed as per the original anime.

Contents

  • 1 Face Plant!
  • 2 Black Eye
  • 3 Rude Awakening
  • 4 Tokyo-3
  • 5 "I'm Home"
  • 6 Pen Pen
  • 7 MI-MI-MISATO-SAN!!!
  • 8 A soul bath
  • 9 Bousou is Japanese for "Batshit Insane"
  • 10 The blight of the shrunken pylons... Why? Why?

Face Plant![edit]

In Rebuild, she falls onto her knees first. Huh.


Black Eye[edit]

Some new-looking stuff actually flashes on the screen during Sachiel's poundage, but we only have enough room for so much. (Plus these screens are so crappy, you should consider any deprivation an act of mercy.) Shinji's nut has been removed to give us a better view of Sachiel's handsome visage.


Rude Awakening[edit]


Tokyo-3[edit]

CG. Yay, w00t w00t.

"I'm Home"[edit]

Note some variety in the Rebuild counterpart. There's more advertising too. Doritos and all.

Pen Pen[edit]

MI-MI-MISATO-SAN!!![edit]

A soul bath[edit]

In addition to the color of the water, Shinji's pose is a mirror image of Misato's. Also, there is a slight presence of Misato's nipples.

Bousou is Japanese for "Batshit Insane"[edit]

When the original battle was THAT cool, why change anything? All available cuts of the Eva-01/Sachiel battle correspond to ones in the original, although some have been completely redesigned. And, in over ten years, Sachiel couldn't come up with a more interesting way to piss Sho off than by breaking her arm and poking out her eye. Sheesh...


The original has more detail in the drawing. Also, the Rebuild sequence is wildly different: Rather than prying the jaw pieces apart and breaking a peg, Sho has to... Eh, better to see it in action yourself.


Original much more detailed here, as well. (Then, if we're being dealt a heavy hand of Cel Shading, this might be expected.) At least we get some eye-blinking action. And no more silly jointed mandible piece.


Okay, probably impossible to see anything in the shitty trailer caps, but you can pretend.


The blight of the shrunken pylons... Why? Why?[edit]

Taste the rainbow.


Sachi's eyes still go all sparkly before he does his crucifix of light thingy. His looks haven't changed in ten years!


Looks like it's red blood now for our Sachi. Appropriate enough, considering every other Angel known to have blood has it in red.


The original douga is represented here frame for frame. Stupidly enough, they let a blooper get through here: Day-Glo Eva-01 is supposed to have PAIRED stripes on her horn, not just one. WHOOPS. (Was it fixed in the final?)


Oooo... Core is spark-ly...


The rainbow symbolizes the homosexual inclinations that Sachiel had been hiding during his extremely short life. With his completely ineffective suicide explosion, he has been liberated... in more ways than one.

Or not.

Not included here is the first frame or two, showing that Sachiel bursts into a bloodbath a split second before KABOOM! Lovely.


Drastic differences, most evident in motion. Rebuild Eva-01 has more of a "possessed Eva-03"-type walk going on. Also note how she looks suspiciously like a man in a suit.


← Back to Neon Genesis Evangelion vs. Evangelion 1.0.
